Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Green Motor Parts, And Getz Properties, Inc. (Fka Lucky Auto Supply)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Green Motor Parts and Getz Properties, Inc. (fka Lucky Auto Supply)
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Geoff Sloniker, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Daniel Barrientos, whose appearance was waived at the last calling of the case on March 25, 2021.
Mr. Sloniker appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Green Motor Parts or Getz Properties, Inc. (fka Lucky Auto Supply)

Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury - Asbestos, was filed on May 18, 2017.
Amendment to plaintiff's Complaint substituting Green Motor Parts for DOE 8, and Getz Properties, Inc. (fka Lucky Auto Supply) for DOE 9, was filed on September 29, 2017.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint, Amendment to Complaint and Statement of Damages were personally served on defendant Getz Properties, Inc.'s Agent of Process on October 21, 2017, and personally served on defendant Green Motor Parts' Agent of Service of Process on October 25, 2017.
Statement of Damages as to each defendant was filed with the Clerk's Office on January 12, 2018.
Default as to both defendants was entered on January 12, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Daniel Barrientos, and against the defaulted defendants Green Motor Parts and Getz Properties, Inc. (fka Lucky Auto Supply), as follows:

Economic Damages - $1,480,038.98.
Non-Economic Damages - $3,000,000.00.

Total - $4,480,038.98.

Additionally, it is the Judgment of this Court that the above-stated damages are considered Joint and Several as to the named defendants, and therefore subject to credit.
